name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at their Detroit, MI location and online.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, offering emergency short-term lending solutions. The company has been reviewed by customers seeking rapid access to cash for unexpected expenses. Their business model centers on providing fast loan approval and funding for consumers regardless of credit history.

The company provides multiple loan products including payday loans (up to $1,000), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), same-day loans, cash advances, and personal loans. All products are unsecured loans available to applicants with all credit types. They advertise a fast process with online application forms and claim approval can happen within hours. The physical location operates Monday-Friday 8am-9pm and Saturday-Sunday 10am-7pm.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through personalized in-person service, with customer reviews specifically praising staff member Doris for patience, clarity in explaining terms, and transparency about fees and repayment conditions. Customers report the application process taking 45 minutes to a couple hours in-person, with some receiving funds the same day. The company emphasizes accepting all credit types and requiring no collateral, positioning itself as accessible to borrowers traditional lenders reject.

However, critical limitations exist. The website provides no APR, fee structure, or repayment terms—essential information for evaluating cost. Customer reviews mention "low-interest payday loans" but provide no verification or disclosure of actual rates. One review appears duplicated with a different company name ("Express Payday Loans"), raising authenticity questions. No online pre-approval or full digital process is available despite marketing online applications. The facility reportedly has cramped waiting areas, and the company lacks clear regulatory or licensing information on their website.
pros: Same-day or next-day cash funding reported by multiple customers
Accepts all credit types including bad credit, with no credit checks available
Personalized in-person service with staff reported as patient and transparent about terms
Loan amounts available up to $50,000 for bad credit products
No hidden fees emphasized by customer reviews
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—impossible to evaluate actual cost
Limited digital process; online application requires connection to third-party lender with no pre-approval
Physical location only in Detroit; no clear online-only lending available despite website structure
One customer review appears duplicated under different company name, raising review authenticity concerns
Physical waiting area reported as cramped with limited seating
best_for: Consumers with bad credit needing emergency cash ($100-$1,000) for same-day expenses in the Detroit area
Borrowers in Detroit who prefer in-person service and want face-to-face explanation of loan terms
Individuals seeking loans up to $50,000 who have been rejected by traditional banks
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is designed for Detroit-area residents with poor credit who need emergency cash ($100-$1,000+) and prefer in-person service with transparent staff interaction. The critical caveat is that the company discloses no interest rates, APR, or fees on their website, making it impossible to assess whether rates are competitive or exploitative—essential due diligence before applying.
